prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Here we go.

**You've already done the hardest part** - you made the decision to start. Everything else is just execution.

That uncomfortable feeling you've been avoiding? It's going to be **way smaller** than the dread you've been carrying around all morning. It always is.

You don't need to feel ready. You don't need the perfect moment. You just need the next **five minutes.**

Set a timer. Start messy. Start imperfect. Just **start.**

The version of you on the other side of this task is going to feel so much lighter. Go be that person.

**Now go. You've got this.**
